text.message: You seem to be trading with blue happily

and the trade with blue was after he was getting 5/11
ANd you traded blue the 5/11 settle
when i asked for the same trade
bot will pick the one with the most cards
And it not like its any better to let bot decide
I let it be everyone on 2
but my point is: Why do you complain that i steal you when you traded blue the 5/11 settle when I asked for hte same trade on my turn?
the bot steals from whomever has the most points then the most cards
It would have been better for you also if i took the 5/11
"i let the bot decide" is a cop out
A cop out but not a mistake
Do don't know who was going inning it was the first rl haha
And the trade with blue wasn't even a cop out, just an active bludner
the wood for brick trade was way after
not if we make a deal :)
dirty mono is a good move. But not to player in last.
didn't have to dirty mono it.

U of Ed me a card or 2
i don't owe you nothing bud
i think blacks ahead of blue

in exchance i can let you use my port for free
